homePreviewSections.title: Minimal home, sharp internals.
homePreviewSections.body: A home clean enough to feel deliberate, with the logo centered and motion reserved for the moments that matter.

homePreviewSections.title: Shared transition into the top bar.
homePreviewSections.body: The home keeps the logo readable as it docks into the top area, with the fixed mark staying above the header gradient on scroll.
